title: 8 Godly Disciplines to Build Before You're 25
caption:
What you practice in your 20s is the man you become.

Not your highlight reel. Not your best weeks. The ordinary Tuesday habits.

Open Scripture before you open your feed. Move your body before you have an excuse not to. Tell one man the specific truth about where you're losing. Keep the small promise you made to yourself yesterday.

Do the task no one else wants. Put the phone down an hour before you sleep. Pray out loud, alone, without an audience. Write down what God did this week.

These aren't impressive. They're foundational. The man who builds them before 25 has something to give at 35 that the man who skipped them is still looking for.

Save this and pick the one you haven't started.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #habits #christianity #formation
